name: A-Team Sports Facility
about: A-Team Sports Facility is a locally owned and operated multi-sport training center that provides athletes with the tools, space, and guidance to train at their highest potential. The facility features climate-controlled training spaces, including turf rentals for baseball and softball, a weight room, and two industry-leading Full Swing golf simulators. Additionally, it offers private and group lessons in baseball, softball, golf, and athletic performance training. The venue also houses a concessions area called The Dugout, serving food and beverages to athletes and families. For entertainment, the Full Swing simulators go beyond golf, offering a variety of interactive games suitable for parties, team events, and family fun.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to premium Full Swing simulators with world-famous course play
Diverse range of non-golf games and sports simulations for entertainment
Professional golf lessons available for all skill levels
Climate-controlled facility ideal for year-round practice

food_and_drink.notes: Concessions available at The Dugout, offering food and beverages for athletes, families, and guests during practices, lessons, and events.
No mention of alcohol service on-site.

simulator_hardware.notes: Industry-leading simulators offering both golf and a variety of interactive games.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify if clubs are provided, so it is recommended to bring your own golf clubs for simulator use.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue has a concessions area called The Dugout that offers food and beverages. There is no mention of a BYOB policy.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole simulation take?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the duration for an 18-hole simulation.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, A-Team Sports is kid-friendly, offering golf simulators with various games suitable for children, as well as sports training for youth athletes.
